title: Time Tracking by Day
excerpt: I am trying to track the number of days that a task has been worked on. eg the Time Tracker may have 20 hours registered for the task, but split across 5 non-consecutive days. I need to pull that number of days out.

posts.author: cdevineOCF (Christopher Devine)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to track the number of days that a task has been worked on. eg the Time Tracker may have 20 hours registered for the task, but split across 5 non-consecutive days. I need to pull that number of days out.

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Christopher
With the time tracking column it should give you a full breakdown of all the hours logged and which days, You are also able to export to excel
The excel will give start & end date so you can work out the number of days
Let me know if it’s something different you are meaning
Hope this helps
Many thanks in advance
Dan
